query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS waitlist (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  company VARCHAR(255),
  phone VARCHAR(50),
  message TEXT,
  "createdAt" TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL
);
